Shikai Jin

Rice University | CTBP

Download Resume

Basic information

I am a Ph.D. candidate pursuing Computational Biophysics in the Center for Theoretical Biological Physics at Rice University. I developed the force field of AWSEM-Suite and the framework of its web-based interface in the past three years. AWSEM-Suite is the latest version of AWSEM force field that designed from 2012.

Skills

HTML
CSS

Maven
Spark
Storm
Jekyll

Education

Rice University 2017 - Now | Ph.D. candidate in Computational Biophysics

As a Ph.D. candidate, work in the force field design and applications in molecular replacement.

Zhejiang University 2013 - 2017 | B.S in Biology

Graduate from Chu Kochen Honors College in Zhejiang University.

Mainly works in structure biology, X-ray crystallography and cryo-EM technology.

Experience


Sep 2016 - Mar 2017

Junior visiting scholar

University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center

Investigate the structure of two-pore channel AtTPC1

Jul 2016 - Sep 2016

Summer intern student

Salk Institute

Projects in cryo-EM image processing with RELION 2
